era: 1984-1987. Proto-Grunge/Metal. E=7 -- transitional, proto-form, the template before the commercial moment. Capitol Hill. Sub Pop / C/Z.
associated_musicians: Pearl Jam (Stone Gossard + Jeff Ament via Mother Love Bone 1990)
Mother Love Bone (Gossard + Ament + Andrew Wood 1988-1990)
Andrew Wood (Mother Love Bone vocalist, died March 19 1990)

theory_nodes.concept: One band, two futures. Arm + Turner → Mudhoney (Sub Pop grunge template, still active 2026). Gossard + Ament → Mother Love Bone → Pearl Jam (Ten, 13M US copies). The most consequential band dissolution in Seattle history.
theory_nodes.description: Green River contains the genetic material of both Mudhoney and Pearl Jam.

theory_nodes.concept: Deep Six (1986, C/Z) companion to Skin Yard (degree 338). Degrees 338-339 consecutive Deep Six alumni. Pre-commercial Seattle heavy scene documented in two consecutive degrees.
theory_nodes.description: The engine's sequential placement mirrors the Deep Six co-appearance.

theory_nodes.concept: E=7 as proto-form energy. Green River E=7 points toward Nirvana E=9. The transitional energy: heavier than punk, not yet maximally heavy. Summit energy profile: 9-7-7-9 (TAD, Skin Yard, Green River, Nirvana).
theory_nodes.description: Proto-grunge as proto-metal: the intermediate step before the commercial peak.

cross_references.relationship: E=7 holds. Both Deep Six alumni (1986). Consecutive engine placement mirrors Deep Six co-appearance. C/Z underground (Skin Yard) to Sub Pop proto-era (Green River).
Proto-form immediately precedes peak form. Green River E=7 (potential, transitional) → Nirvana E=9 (full realization, commercial apex). Genetic material becomes commercial climax.
Mark Arm + Steve Turner post-dissolution 1988. Sub Pop grunge template wing. Still active 2026.
Stone Gossard + Jeff Ament via Mother Love Bone 1990. Multi-platinum wing. Ten: 13M US copies.

sps_pair.pairing_note: E=7 + E=7 = E=14. Spring hydrology. Proto-grunge as proto-metal: the river builds toward something, as Green River builds toward Nirvana.

milestones: THE BAND THAT BECAME TWO BANDS
PEARL JAM AND MUDHONEY GENETIC SOURCE
